headline: Morgan Stanley resets Monster stock price target after earnings
summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) just earned another vote of confidence from Wall Street, and the reasoning behind it tells investors more than the new price tag does. Morgan Stanley lifted its target on the energy drink giant and kept its bullish rating in place. The size of the increase is small. The ...

headline: SpaceX negotiating underwriting fees under 0.75% for IPO, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is negotiating with banks underwriting its initial public offering to pay fees of less ‌than 0.75% on the roughly $75 billion it aims to raise ‌this month, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday.  Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, BofA Securities, Citigroup and J.P.Morgan are the joint book-running managers for ‌the offering, leading a syndicate ⁠of global investment banks underwriting the deal.

headline: Morgan Stanley Expansion Capital Leads $33 Million Growth Financing For Subtle Medical
summary: NEW YORK, June 02, 2026--Morgan Stanley Investment Management announced today that funds managed by Morgan Stanley Expansion Capital have led a $33 million growth financing for Subtle Medical (the Company), a medical imaging software company using artificial intelligence to improve imaging workflow efficiency and image quality across MRI, PET and CT. headline: Forget the benchmark; here's where Morgan Stanley sees China’s real return opportunities
summary: Morgan Stanley's Laura Wang argues that investors should look beyond broad China indices and focus on structural winners, particularly within the semiconductor value chain. She remains cautious on consumer-facing sectors, saying a K-shaped recovery continues to leave consumption lagging behind other parts of the economy.
